title: Tower T826140BLK Scandi 5 Piece Acacia Wood Storage Set with Bread Bin, Biscuit Barrel, Canisters, Black
features: 5 PIECE STORAGE SET: Equip your kitchen with a collection of practical storage essentials including a bread bin, biscuit barrel and 3 canisters
MULTI-FUNCTIONAL DESIGN: The front of the bread bin features a clever detachable lid design which doubles as an acacia wood chopping board for preparing your fresh ingredients
CONTENTS STAY FRESH: The canisters and biscuit barrel feature a strong iron construction with airtight-sealed lids to extend the life of tea, coffee, sugar and other loose ingredients for longer
LARGE CAPACITY: Features larger storage space, letting you store more baked goods and bigger portions of loose ingredients, which is perfect for family homes
EASY TO CLEAN: Maintain the set’s sleek finish by simply using a damp cloth for a quick and effective clean
SCANDI COLLECTION: The Nordic black colourway with natural Acacia Wood textures forms part of the Tower Scandi range
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and optional 1 year extension, subject to product registration online

A BRAND YOU CAN TRUST: Tower is an iconic British brand boasting over 100 years of quality in manufacturing and design excellence. Tower is the UK’s fastest growing SDA & Housewares brand loved by millions of households
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower T826140BLK Scandi 5 Piece Acacia Storage Set with Bread Bin, Biscuit Barrel, Canisters, Black Reinvent the look of your kitchen with this stylish Scandinavian-inspired storage set from Tower Accessorise your kitchen with the durable, decorative Scandi 5-piece storage collection. Complete with an iron-bodied bread bin, biscuit barrel and 3 canisters, you can keep all of your ingredients stored away with long lasting freshness. Each piece features a Scandinavian-inspired pink clay colouring, combined with natural acacia wood textures to complete your kitchen’s look. Both stylish and practical, the bread bin's acacia front can be completely detached for use as a chopping board. 5 piece storage set, including: 1 x bread bin, 1 x biscuit barrel, 3 x canisters Coloured iron body with natural acacia Detachable front of bread bin Wipe clean to maintain finish Canister Dimensions: D11 x H14cm Biscuit Barrel Dimensions: D13.5 x H16.5cm Bread Bin Dimensions: H21 x W35 x D21cm CONTENTS STAY FRESH The canisters and biscuit barrel feature a strong iron construction with airtight-sealed lids to extend the life of tea, coffee, sugar and other loose ingredients for longer. 5 PIECE STORAGE SET Equip your kitchen with a collection of practical storage essentials including a bread bin, biscuit barrel and 3 canisters MULTI-FUNCTIONAL DESIGN The front of the bread bin features a clever detachable lid design which doubles as an acacia wood chopping board for preparing your fresh ingredients
